basics.name: Siyuan Lu
basics.label: Undergraduate Student
basics.summary: An undergraduate student at Beijing University of Post and Telecommunications (BUPT) with a strong interest in software development, data analysis, and machine learning. Proven academic record with multiple scholarships and active contributions to research and open-source projects.

education.institution: Beijing University of Post and Telecommunications (BUPT)

publications.name: Unleashing the Potential of Large Language Models as Prompt Optimizers: An Analogical Analysis with Gradient-based Model Optimizers
PreAct: Predicting Future in ReAct Enhances Agent's Planning Ability

projects.name: CS61B Lab&Proj
projects.description: CS61B is one of the most famous courses in UC Berkeley focused on data structures. The best project, 'gitlet' (Project2), required implementing most features of Git. Completed individually with a design document.

projects.name: CRSLab
projects.description: CRSLab is an open-source toolkit for building Conversational Recommender Systems (CRS), developed using Python and PyTorch. The project has garnered 400+ stars on GitHub. Served as one of the maintainers for 6 months.
